name: Roasted Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500 degrees F (250 degrees C).
2. Arrange asparagus in a single layer in a shallow baking pan.
3. Brush olive oil on the asparagus spears using a pastry brush.
4. Roast for 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender but still crisp, turning the spears occasionally for even cooking and to avoid browning.
5. Place roasted asparagus on a serving platter.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve with lemon wedges.
